data_boundary.note: WP2 validates and summarizes public read-only ETF historical data for research pipeline validation; it is not a trading instruction or investment basis.

final_trading_notice: Final trading is manually decided by the user.

adjusted_price_coverage.description: Every input row has positive numeric adjusted_close and total_return_index fields.

benchmark_availability.description: The benchmark symbol exists in the universe and has one month-end observation for every panel month.

daily_missing_data.description: Every symbol has values for each observed daily date after its first available date.

monthly_missing_data.description: Every symbol has one reviewed month-end observation for each panel month.

stale_prices.description: Every symbol has a latest available price within the configured stale-price tolerance.

universe_allowlist.description: Every symbol in the real data file and WP1 metadata must come from configs/universe/etf_universe.yaml.

required_follow_up: Proceed to WP3 formal backtest and evidence package after WP2 commit/push verification.
review_target: Stage 3.1 WP2 real data quality and monthly panel

domain.conclusion: All monthly panel symbols and benchmark `VTI` came from configs/universe/etf_universe.yaml and remain ETF-only, non-leveraged, and non-inverse.

integration.conclusion: WP2 writes the reviewed monthly panel to data/processed/stage3_1_monthly_panel.csv and the quality report to reports/data_quality/stage3_1_wp2_data_quality_report.json with missing-data, stale-price, adjusted-price, and benchmark checks.

security.conclusion: No secrets, credentials, broker interfaces, service restarts, dependency installs, Computer Use, or live Hermes/OpenClaw/Feishu gateway configuration changes were introduced.

test.conclusion: WP2 regression tests cover real monthly panel generation, universe allowlist status, benchmark availability, safety flags, internal review generation, and latest artifact progression.

stage: Stage 3.1 Real ETF Historical Data MVP
work_package: WP2 real data quality and monthly panel
